slices.goal: Add v5-serious-pilot-status to scripts/specbridge.ps1. Add it to the command ValidateSet and command switch. Implement a deterministic JSON status command with command, ok, branch, head, pilot_standard, runner_baseline, required_slices, default_runtime_budget_usd, diagnostic_preview_policy, target_completion_status, coordinator_remediation_allowed, and policy_boundary. Static values: pilot_standard=serious_live_multi_slice_no_remediation, runner_baseline=v5_hardened_runtime_runner, required_slices=[status, tests, docs], default_runtime_budget_usd=2.00, diagnostic_preview_policy=ascii_stable_bounded_240_chars, target_completion_status=completed_without_coordinator_remediation, coordinator_remediation_allowed=false, policy_boundary=no-production no-secrets no-billing no-auth no-authorization no-database no-dependency-installation no-ci-cd-security no-deployment. Write concise executor evidence to .specbridge/runtime-evidence/issue-087-status.executor-output.md.

Update scripts/test-specbridge-cli.ps1 to cover v5-serious-pilot-status and timeout exit-code normalization. Assert command=v5-serious-pilot-status, runner_baseline=v5_hardened_runtime_runner, default_runtime_budget_usd=2.00, diagnostic_preview_policy=ascii_stable_bounded_240_chars, coordinator_remediation_allowed=false, and required_slices includes status, tests, docs. Add or update a bounded fake Claude timeout test only if it can run deterministically without network or secrets. Write concise executor evidence to .specbridge/runtime-evidence/issue-087-tests.executor-output.md.

Create docs/specbridge-v5-serious-pilot-status.md and update README.md with the new command. Documentation must explain v5-serious-pilot-status, hardened runner baseline, required slices [status, tests, docs], default 2.00 runtime budget, ASCII-stable diagnostic preview policy, timeout artifact normalization, no-remediation target, and policy boundary. Write concise executor evidence to .specbridge/runtime-evidence/issue-087-docs.executor-output.md.
